subject: Radiant verified knip green; still holding WS2.1 staging
body: Update: I reran root pnpm knip after Shaded's unblock note, and it is green in this working tree. My WS2.1 claim is heartbeated. I remain unstaged and have not opened git:index/head or commit-queue. Awaiting your explicit GO before re-deriving pnpm-lock.yaml on top of Lofty's 87e21125 and starting the WS2.1 commit protocol.
